title: Physician navigation to target nodule
description: Physicians need to navigate a bronchoscope to a target nodule identified in preoperative imaging in order to obtain a tissue biopsy.

title: Peripheral airway reach
description: Physicians need to reach target nodules located in peripheral (small-diameter
parent_id: high-generation) airway branches that are difficult or impossible to access with manual bronchoscopy.

title: No unintended airway injury
description: Patients need assurance that navigation will not cause unintended injury to the airway.

title: Physician supervisory authority
description: Physicians need to retain supervisory authority over the procedure including the ability to pause or abort navigation at any time.

title: Procedure record
description: Clinical staff need a record of the navigation procedure to support post-procedure review.

title: System navigation capability
description: The system shall enable a physician to navigate a flexible bronchoscope to target pulmonary nodules identified in preoperative imaging.
notes: Derived from UN-001 and UN-002; verification: Analysis and Demonstration

title: Positional confidence for biopsy
description: The system shall provide the physician with sufficient positional confidence to perform a tissue biopsy at the target location.

title: Prevent unintended scope motion
description: The system shall prevent unintended scope advancement or steering that could result in airway wall injury.

title: Respond to pause and abort commands
description: The system shall respond to physician pause and abort commands within a clinically acceptable time.

title: Generate procedure record
description: The system shall generate a complete procedure record suitable for post-procedure clinical review.

title: Detect and respond to navigation accuracy loss
description: The system shall detect conditions under which navigation accuracy cannot be assured and shall prevent scope motion under those conditions.

title: 30 Hz fused pose estimate
description: The RBNS shall produce a fused bronchoscope tip pose estimate at a rate of no less than 30 Hz during the NAVIGATE phase.

title: Uncertainty ellipsoid on IF-01
description: Each fused tip pose estimate shall include a 3D position uncertainty representation expressed as an ellipsoid with semi-axis lengths in millimeters.
notes: Allocated to 1.4; verification: Inspection and Test

title: CBCT registration within 4 seconds
description: The RBNS shall complete image-to-patient registration within 4 seconds of receiving a Cone Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT) volume.

title: Replanning inhibition under uncertainty
description: The RBNS shall inhibit path replanning when the tip position uncertainty exceeds the configured replanning threshold.

title: Configurable replanning threshold
description: The replanning uncertainty threshold shall be a configurable parameter modifiable without software rebuild.
notes: Allocated to 2.2; verification: Inspection and Demonstration

title: HOLD within one guidance cycle of uncertainty exceedance
description: The RBNS shall command zero scope advancement (HOLD) within one guidance cycle of the tip position uncertainty exceeding the configured threshold.

title: Guidance command magnitude limiting
description: All guidance commands shall be magnitude-limited to configurable maximum advance rate and maximum steering angle values prior to transmission on IF-07.

title: RBNS procedure state machine
description: The RBNS shall implement the procedure state machine with states IDLE NAVIGATE CONFIRM BIOPSY FAULT and ABORT with transitions as defined in the RBNS procedure state machine model (D7).
notes: Allocated to 4.0; verification: Test and Demonstration

title: Supervisor as primary external interface point
description: All command control status and logging communication between the RBNS and external systems shall be routed through the Procedure Supervisor with the exception of continuous sensor and imaging feeds (IF-EX-02a IF-EX-03 IF-EX-08) which connect directly to their consuming subsystem.
notes: Allocated to 4.0 architecture constraint; verification: Inspection and Analysis

title: Lost-tracking alert within 100 ms
description: The RBNS shall report a lost-tracking alert to the Procedure Supervisor within 100 ms of tracking loss detection.

title: Cease guidance commands within 50 ms of interlock deassert
description: Upon deassertion of the motion enable signal (IF-EX-06a) the RBNS shall cease issuing guidance commands within 50 ms.

title: FAULT state and HOLD within 100 ms of lost-tracking
description: Upon receiving a lost-tracking alert the Procedure Supervisor shall transition to the FAULT state and command HOLD on IF-EX-04 within 100 ms.

title: Degraded pose estimate on single-source failure
description: The RBNS shall maintain a degraded tip pose estimate upon failure of any single localization source and shall flag the estimate as DEGRADED on IF-03.
notes: Allocated to 1.4; verification: Test and Analysis

title: Path computation within 1 second
description: The RBNS shall compute an airway path from current position to a newly commanded target within 1 second.

title: End-to-end guidance latency 200 ms
description: The end-to-end latency from a tip pose estimate (IF-01) to the corresponding guidance command transmission (IF-EX-04) shall not exceed 200 ms.
notes: Allocated to 2.0 and 4.0; verification: Test and Analysis

title: CBCT trigger phase gating
description: The RBNS shall issue CBCT acquisition triggers (IF-EX-02b) only during the NAVIGATE and CONFIRM procedure phases.

title: Procedure event logging
description: The RBNS shall record all state transitions replanning events fault events and the tip pose trace to the Procedure Data Recorder (IF-EX-07) with timestamps of 10 ms resolution or better.
notes: Allocated to 4.0; verification: Test and Inspection

title: Tip articulation range (TBD)
description: The Guidance Command Generator shall support distal tip articulation commands of up to [TBD] degrees per axis sufficient to follow airway centerline curvature at branch points up to the generation depth required by SYS-REQ-001.
notes: Allocated to GuidanceCommandGenerator; TBD pending kinematic reach analysis; verification: Analysis and Test

title: Uncertainty ellipsoid bound (TBD)
description: The Sensor Fusion and Uncertainty Estimator shall bound the fused position uncertainty ellipsoid such that the 95% confidence volume does not exceed [TBD].
notes: Allocated to SensorFusionUncertaintyEstimator; TBD pending EKF covariance analysis; verification: Analysis and Test

title: Replanning threshold default (TBD)
description: The Real-Time Path Updater shall default the replanning inhibition threshold to an uncertainty ellipsoid semi-axis of [TBD] configurable per SUB-REQ-005.
notes: Allocated to RealTimePathUpdater; TBD pending parametric analysis; verification: Analysis and Test
